query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Guest-%') as guest_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE 'Guest-%') as named_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pa.userId) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN users u ON pa.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND pa.userId IS NOT NULL) as guests_with_attempts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ch.userId) FROM cycle_history ch JOIN users u ON ch.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND ch.userId IS NOT NULL) as guests_with_cycles,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ts.userId) FROM training_sets ts JOIN users u ON ts.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND ts.userId IS NOT NULL) as guests_with_sets;

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Guest-%') as guest_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE 'Guest-%') as named_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pa.userId) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN users u ON pa.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND pa.userId IS NOT NULL) as guests_with_attempts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ch.userId) FROM cycle_history ch JOIN users u ON ch.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND ch.userId IS NOT NULL) as guests_with_cycles,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ts.userId) FROM training_sets ts JOIN users u ON ts.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND ts.userId IS NOT NULL) as guests_with_sets;
